_meta.appointmentsPageTerminology: User-facing copy uses Tasks/משימות; the key namespace appointmentsPage is frozen for internal compatibility. The vt_appointments table, /appointments route, and appointmentsPage.* key paths are NOT renamed (Phase 6 §17 forbidden). _meta.* keys are non-rendering metadata (Phase 6 §5 invariant 13) — included in parity, never resolved by user-facing helpers, filtered out of the runtime accessor by stripInternalKeys.

step1.title: Scan your first item
step1.description: Tap the blue scan button at the bottom of the screen to read a QR code. The app instantly loads the status and history.
step1.tip: The scan button is always visible at the center of the bottom bar — you can scan from any screen.

step2.title: Track equipment
step2.description: Open an item and tap 'Check out' to mark it as in your use. Tap 'Return' when done so the team knows where the equipment is.
step2.tip: Items you've checked out appear in the 'Mine' tab in the bottom navigation.

step3.title: Report issues instantly
step3.description: Found damaged equipment? Tap 'Report issue' on the item detail page. The team gets an immediate alert.
step3.tip: You can also report issues from the menu icon in the top right corner.

outcomeKpiDashboard.title: Outcome KPI & ROI
outcomeKpiDashboard.metaDescription: Hospital leadership view: time to triage, handoff integrity, and revenue recovery vs the 14-day pre-activation baseline.
outcomeKpiDashboard.subtitle: Compare the trailing post-activation period to the 14 days before go-live. Requires an activation timestamp in server configuration.
outcomeKpiDashboard.loadError: Could not load outcome KPI data.
outcomeKpiDashboard.noActivationBody: KPI comparisons will be available once an administrator configures the go-live date.
outcomeKpiDashboard.noActivationAdminHint: Set configuration key outcome_kpi_activation_at:<clinic-id> in server settings to an ISO-8601 timestamp value.
outcomeKpiDashboard.kpiTriageDesc: Median minutes from intake to first assignment (P50), same methodology as ER impact metrics.
outcomeKpiDashboard.kpiHandoffDesc: Share of structured clinical handoffs acknowledged directly by the incoming assignee (excludes forced overrides).
outcomeKpiDashboard.kpiRevenueRecoveryDesc: Capture score: 100 minus consumable billing leakage (dispensed vs billed quantities). Higher means fewer missed charges.
outcomeKpiDashboard.methodologyNote: Deltas are oriented so positive percentages indicate improvement (faster triage, higher integrity, stronger revenue capture).

landingPage.seoTitle: VetTrack — Veterinary Equipment QR Tracking System
landingPage.seoDescription: VetTrack — veterinary equipment QR tracking for vet hospitals and ER clinics. Real-time status, offline sync, alerts, and shift handoffs from any phone.
landingPage.seoKeywords: veterinary equipment tracking software, vet hospital QR tracking system, ER veterinary workflow tool, animal hospital equipment management, veterinary management software
landingPage.ogTitle: VetTrack — Veterinary Equipment QR Tracking System
landingPage.ogDescription: Mobile-first QR equipment tracking for veterinary hospitals and ER clinics. Real-time status, offline support, issue alerts, and shift handoffs — all from any device.
landingPage.twitterTitle: VetTrack — Veterinary Equipment QR Tracking System
landingPage.twitterDescription: Mobile-first QR equipment tracking for veterinary hospitals and ER clinics.
landingPage.heroBadge: Built for veterinary ER, ICU & surgery floors
landingPage.heroBody: The mobile operations layer for high-acuity hospitals—QR and NFC in seconds, real-time triage, offline-first sync, and shift-ready handoffs. Like enterprise CMMS, tuned for the pace of a code blue, not a factory line.
landingPage.heroNoCard: No card required to explore the app
landingPage.previewSyncNote: Syncs when connectivity returns — nothing lost in the red zone
landingPage.stat1Label: to log an issue or checkout
landingPage.bentoSubtitle: Scan-first workflows your techs can run between patients—alerts with teeth, a floor map that matches reality, and reporting that holds up in reviews.
landingPage.bento1Body: QR and NFC in the flow of care—no hunting for the right form. Check out, report, and route issues before you leave the bedside.
landingPage.bento2Body: Dead zones in radiology, surgery, and holding? Queue work locally, merge cleanly when you reconnect—UpKeep-style reliability, clinic-sized.
landingPage.bento3Body: Triage that respects urgency. Acknowledge ownership so nothing bounces.
landingPage.bento4Body: See where equipment lives and moves—not a spreadsheet of serial numbers.
landingPage.bento5Body: One-click PDF trails for compliance—maintenance, sterilization, and exceptions.
landingPage.bento6Body: Container-aware inventory sessions for consumables and kits—closer to Sortly precision than a shared cart in the break room.
landingPage.bento7Body: Technicians, leads, and admins see the right surface area—decision support without turning the EMR into the equipment system of record.
landingPage.howSubtitle: The same three beats as a modern CMMS go-live—compressed for a team that can’t pause the floor.
landingPage.how1Body: Print QR from admin, attach to kits and devices. One scan ties physical gear to a living record.
landingPage.how2Body: Staff log checkouts, issues, and room moves from pocket devices—no training binders required.
landingPage.how3Body: Dashboards and PDF exports close the loop for managers and review—alerts first, paper never.
landingPage.quoteBody: We stopped playing telephone about ventilators and monitors. The floor self-organizes when everyone can see the same source of truth.
landingPage.finalBody: Your team is already in motion. VetTrack meets them there—PWA, offline sync, and alerts that respect how critical care actually runs.
landingPage.footerTagline: Clinical equipment operations for modern veterinary hospitals.

helpPage.scanQrDescription: Tap the blue scan button at the bottom to scan equipment. Instantly loads status and history.
helpPage.checkoutDescription: Open an item -> tap 'Check out'. Your name appears on the item so the team knows who has it.
helpPage.returnDescription: Open the item you took -> tap 'Return'. Removes your name and marks it as available.
helpPage.reportIssueDescription: Found damaged equipment? Open item -> tap 'Issue'. The team receives an immediate alert.
helpPage.okDescription: Equipment scanned and ready to use.
helpPage.sterilizedDescription: Item has been sterilized. Will alert when sterilization window expires.
helpPage.maintenanceDescription: Marked for maintenance. Check with admin before use.
helpPage.issueDescription: A fault has been reported. Item should not be used until cleared.
helpPage.inactiveDescription: Item has been removed from service temporarily or permanently.
helpPage.healthRingDescription: The colored ring on each room card shows the percentage of items verified in the last 24 hours. Green >= 80%, Orange >= 40%, Red < 40%.
helpPage.syncedDescription: All items in this room have been verified in the last 24 hours.
helpPage.staleDescription: Room has not been checked in over 24 hours. Tap the room to verify items.
helpPage.auditRequiredDescription: An item in this room was flagged. A full audit is required before the room can be cleared.
helpPage.nfcDescription: Tap the NFC sticker on the room door to open the verification screen. Confirm to mark all items as verified in one tap.
helpPage.pendingDescription: Action saved locally and waiting to be sent to the server. Happens when offline. Will sync automatically when connected.
helpPage.failedDescription: Action could not sync after multiple attempts. Tap the cloud icon to view and retry.
helpPage.offlineDescription: No internet connection. The app continues to work — all changes are queued and will sync automatically.
helpPage.activeAlertsDescription: The red badge on the bell icon shows how many items need attention. Tap to view and acknowledge.
helpPage.pushAlertsDescription: Enable push notifications in Settings -> Push Notifications to receive real-time alerts even when the app is in the background.
helpPage.title: Quick Guide
helpPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know to use VetTrack

Hides non-equipment menu items AND unmounts their routes — direct links to /billing, /patients, /meds, /analytics etc. will return Not Found while pilot mode is on. Code Blue / Crash Cart / Ward Display deep links DO stay reachable (those routes are always mounted). Per-browser override; takes effect after reload.

cop.discrepancySubtitle: Possible orphan drug use — patient charge does not match an active order or inpatient stay.

cop.adminNoDispenseTitle: Probable orphan usage (administered without cabinet dispense)
cop.adminNoDispenseSubtitle: This medication task was completed without a matching cabinet pull for this patient and drug in the lookback window — possible use of leftover stock.
cop.resolveOnlyFooter: Clear through billing reconciliation (return unused charge to stock) or retroactive billing linkage — not by dismissing this banner.

adminOpsDashboard.offlineSyncSubtitle: Bounded Dexie queue health from throttled client telemetry (aggregate buckets only).

adminOpsDashboard.dlqSectionSubtitle: Unpublished events that exceeded retry thresholds. Retry re-queues them; drop permanently removes toxic rows.
adminOpsDashboard.dlqEmpty: No dead-letter rows for this clinic.
adminOpsDashboard.dlqRetryConfirmDescription: Resets retry metadata so the publisher will attempt delivery again for every dead-letter row in this clinic.
adminOpsDashboard.dlqForceRetryLabel: Include {count} permanent (terminal) failure(s) — required to retry them
adminOpsDashboard.dlqDropConfirmDescription: Permanently deletes {count} selected row(s). This cannot be undone.

inventoryJobsPage.autoRefreshHint: Auto-refreshes every 30 seconds. The background recovery scheduler re-processes failed jobs when the worker is running.

phoneSignIn.title: Phone Sign In
phoneSignIn.phoneFormatHintA: Enter a phone number in international format (e.g.,
phoneSignIn.errorNotAvailableFull: Phone sign-in is not available for this account. Use another sign-in method, or contact support if you are connecting with an Israeli number (+972) and getting an error — Israel must be enabled in Clerk Dashboard (Configure → Phone numbers → SMS sending → Allowed countries).
phoneSignIn.errorNotAvailableShort: Phone sign-in is not available for this account. Try another method, or contact your admin.
phoneSignIn.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Try again or use another sign-in method.

whatsNew.title: What's New — VetTrack
whatsNew.heading: What's New
whatsNew.description: The latest features and improvements in VetTrack.

clinicalDesign.title: Clinical design system refresh
clinicalDesign.description: Refreshed typography, contrast, and 44px touch targets across equipment, Today, alerts, and Code Blue — built for bedside use on phones and tablets.

accessibility.title: Accessibility improvements
accessibility.description: Skip-to-content link, visible focus rings, form labels, and WCAG AA contrast on emergency and alert surfaces.

nativeApp.title: Native iOS app
nativeApp.description: VetTrack runs as a bundled Capacitor app on iOS with NFC scanning, camera capture, haptic feedback, and offline-capable sync.

signIn.title: Sign in with Apple & Google
signIn.description: Social sign-in opens in the system browser for secure one-tap login on mobile, in addition to email and password.

navigation.title: Easier navigation
navigation.description: Back button on every screen, fixed header while scrolling, and a clear exit from the Equipment Command Board.

shiftLeaderboard.title: Shift scan leaderboard
shiftLeaderboard.description: Scan counts and averages per user across shifts. Users with zero scans in any shift are flagged.
shiftLeaderboard.loadError: Failed to load shift completion data
shiftLeaderboard.emptySubtitle: No users with shift activity in the selected period
